QR · WhatsApp · Control rooms

Hospitality operations, composed like a luxury SaaS.

TIPTAP unifies QR entry, WhatsApp guest journeys, and ledger-grade dashboards — tips, ratings, payments, statements, and reconciliation — so your brand stays coherent from first scan to settlement.

Entry architecture

Three front doors. One operating system.

TIPTAP is role-aware from the first click — so managers, providers, and operators each land in the right mental model.

Category-native onboarding, branch scope, and a control room tuned for revenue and service signals.

Sign in

How it fits

QR, WhatsApp, dashboards — intentionally sequenced

01

Scan

QR opens a session-aware handoff — menu, table, or treatment context travels with the guest.

02

Converse

WhatsApp carries the thread: orders, assistance, tips, and payments without app friction.

03

Command

Managers see analytics, payments health, statements, and reconciliation in one ivory workspace.

What TIPTAP does

A multi-tenant layer for brands where the floor and finance must share one narrative. Guests scan, chat, tip, and pay; you keep branch-aware control with premium surfaces — not generic admin chrome.

One spine, many surfaces

Operational events, payments, tips, and ratings roll into the same period-aware analytics — so exceptions have context, not just counts.

Why it matters

Revenue leakage hides in handoffs. TIPTAP highlights drag before it becomes a fire drill.

Who it is for

Owners and branch leads who need operational intelligence without diluting the brand.

QR-powered access
WhatsApp journeys
Staff & provider ops
Analytics & KPIs
Tips, ratings, payments
Statements & reconciliation

Food & Dining

Floor rhythm, menu depth, bill choreography

Waiter calls, digital bills, dining support, and tip flows for high-volume rooms — visually calm, operationally sharp.

  • Table & session context
  • Bill & assistance queues
  • Dining-native analytics

Beauty & Grooming

Stations, services, quiet assistance

Provider-aware handoffs, catalogs, and assistance signals built for high-trust environments.

  • Stations & services
  • Assistance signals
  • Category analytics

Control room aesthetic

Ivory fields, smoke type, disciplined motion — built for owners who live in numbers and providers who live on the floor.

Merchant outcomes

  • Control — Branch scopes, roles, and immutable audit for disputes.
  • Visibility — Payments, tips, and sentiment on one timeline — not five CSVs.
  • Separation — Collections, digital tips, and payouts modeled distinctly.
  • Intelligence — Reconciliation flags while operations still has context.

Launch with discipline

QR handoffs, WhatsApp care, and finance-grade rollups — composed for serious hospitality brands.
